calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for the Petitioner.

Ms. Ng stated that she came in late on this matter, that all siblings were noticed, that no one was objecting to the disclaimer and requested the petition be granted. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Anderson.

Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Continued To Mar-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng (Counsel for Sau Yee, Personal Representative).

Ms. Ng reported on the status of the estate administration and advised the Court that the personal representative wished to sell the real property through probate rather than after final distribution. As such, she requested a continuance of the matter to May 2007 given the exegencies of probate real estate transactions. The Court declined that distant date but instead continued the matter to March 12, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Office: Herbert Donaldson, Judge; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722 ; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
